obligation.goal: eq (is_free_in_frm (fresh_var x t p) p) false

proofs: destruct (fv_is_free_in_frm p (fresh_var x t p)) as [_ Htrue_in]. destruct (is_free_in_frm (fresh_var x t p) p) eqn:H.

hypotheses: Htrue_in : forall _ : eq true true, List.In (fresh_var x t p) (fvs_frm p)
H : eq (is_free_in_frm (fresh_var x t p) p) true
Htrue_in : forall _ : eq false true, List.In (fresh_var x t p) (fvs_frm p)
H : eq (is_free_in_frm (fresh_var x t p) p) false

attempts: apply not_true_is_false. intro H. apply (proj2 (fv_is_free_in_frm p (fresh_var x t p))) in H. unfold fresh_var in H. apply maxs_spec in H. pose proof (maxs_suffix (app (cons x nil) (fvs_trm t)) (fvs_frm p)) as Hle. omega.

destruct (fv_is_free_in_frm p (fresh_var x t p)) as [_ Htrue_in]. destruct (is_free_in_frm (fresh_var x t p) p) eqn:H.
- exfalso. apply Htrue_in in H. unfold fresh_var in *. set (L := app (cons x nil) (app (fvs_trm t) (fvs_frm p))). assert (HinL : In (1 + maxs L) L) by
    (apply in_or_app; right; apply in_or_app; right; exact H). assert (Hle : forall l n, In n l -> n <= maxs l) by
    (induction l; simpl; intros n' H0;
     [ contradiction
     | destruct H0 as [H1|H2];
       [ subst; apply Nat.le_max_l
       | apply Nat.le_trans with (maxs l); [ apply IHl, H2 | apply Nat.le_max_r ] ] ]). apply Hle in HinL; omega.
- reflexivity.
failed_attempts: apply not_true_is_false. intro H. apply (proj2 (fv_is_free_in_frm p (fresh_var x t p))) in H. unfold fresh_var in H. apply maxs_spec in H. pose proof (maxs_suffix (app (cons x nil) (fvs_trm t)) (fvs_frm p)) as Hle. omega.

hypotheses: Htrue_in : forall _ : eq true true, List.In (fresh_var x t p) (fvs_frm p)
H : eq (is_free_in_frm (fresh_var x t p) p) true

proofs: destruct (fv_is_free_in_frm p (fresh_var x t p)) as [_ Htrue_in]. destruct (is_free_in_frm (fresh_var x t p) p) eqn:H.

hypotheses: Htrue_in : forall _ : eq true true, List.In (fresh_var x t p) (fvs_frm p)
H : eq (is_free_in_frm (fresh_var x t p) p) true

value.proof_prefix: destruct (fv_is_free_in_frm p (fresh_var x t p)) as [_ Htrue_in]. destruct (is_free_in_frm (fresh_var x t p) p) eqn:H.

attempts:
exfalso. apply Htrue_in in H. unfold fresh_var in *. set (L := app (cons x nil) (app (fvs_trm t) (fvs_frm p))). assert (HinL : In (1 + maxs L) L) by
    (apply in_or_app; right; apply in_or_app; right; exact H). assert (Hle : forall l n, In n l -> n <= maxs l) by
    (induction l; simpl; intros n' H0;
     [ contradiction
     | destruct H0 as [H1|H2];
       [ subst; apply Nat.le_max_l
       | apply Nat.le_trans with (maxs l); [ apply IHl, H2 | apply Nat.le_max_r ] ] ]). apply Hle in HinL; omega.

exfalso. assert (Hlt : forall l z, In z l -> z < 1 + maxs l) by (induction l; intros z H; [contradiction|]; simpl; destruct H as [H|H]; subst; [apply (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt _ (Nat.le_max_l _ _) (Nat.lt_succ_diag_r _)) | apply (Nat.lt_le_trans (IHl z H) (Nat.add_le_mono_l _ _ (Nat.le_max_r _ _)))]). assert (Hin_l : In (fresh_var x t p) (x :: fvs_trm t ++ fvs_frm p)) by (apply in_cons; apply in_or_app; right; apply (proj2 (fv_is_free_in_frm p (fresh_var x t p)) H)). assert (Hcontra : fresh_var x t p < fresh_var x t p) by (unfold fresh_var; apply (Hlt (x :: fvs_trm t ++ fvs_frm p) (fresh_var x t p) Hin_l)). exact (Nat.lt_irrefl _ Hcontra).

exfalso. assert (Hin : List.In (fresh_var x t p) (fvs_frm p)) by apply (Htrue_in eq_refl). assert (Hmem : List.In (fresh_var x t p) (x :: fvs_trm t ++ fvs_frm p)) by
  (apply List.in_cons; apply in_or_app; right; exact Hin). assert (Hmaxs_spec : forall (l : list ivar) (n : ivar), List.In n l -> n <= maxs l) by
  (induction l as [|a l IH]; simpl; intros n H;
   [contradiction | destruct H as [H|H]; [subst; apply Nat.le_max_l | apply le_trans with (maxs l); [apply IH, H | apply Nat.le_max_r]]]). assert (Hle : fresh_var x t p <= maxs (x :: fvs_trm t ++ fvs_frm p)) by apply (Hmaxs_spec _ _ Hmem). unfold fresh_var in Hle. exact (Nat.nle_succ_diag_l _ Hle).

exfalso. apply Htrue_in in H. unfold fresh_var in *. set (L := app (cons x nil) (app (fvs_trm t) (fvs_frm p))). assert (HinL : In (1 + maxs L) L) by
    (apply in_or_app; right; apply in_or_app; right; exact H). assert (Hle : forall l n, In n l -> n <= maxs l) by
    (induction l; simpl; intros n' H0;
     [ contradiction
     | destruct H0 as [H1|H2];
       [ subst; apply Nat.le_max_l
       | apply Nat.le_trans with (maxs l); [ apply IHl, H2 | apply Nat.le_max_r ] ] ]). apply Hle in HinL; omega.

exfalso. assert (Hlt : forall l z, In z l -> z < 1 + maxs l) by (induction l; intros z H; [contradiction|]; simpl; destruct H as [H|H]; subst; [apply (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt _ (Nat.le_max_l _ _) (Nat.lt_succ_diag_r _)) | apply (Nat.lt_le_trans (IHl z H) (Nat.add_le_mono_l _ _ (Nat.le_max_r _ _)))]). assert (Hin_l : In (fresh_var x t p) (x :: fvs_trm t ++ fvs_frm p)) by (apply in_cons; apply in_or_app; right; apply (proj2 (fv_is_free_in_frm p (fresh_var x t p)) H)). assert (Hcontra : fresh_var x t p < fresh_var x t p) by (unfold fresh_var; apply (Hlt (x :: fvs_trm t ++ fvs_frm p) (fresh_var x t p) Hin_l)). exact (Nat.lt_irrefl _ Hcontra).

exfalso. assert (Hin : List.In (fresh_var x t p) (fvs_frm p)) by apply (Htrue_in eq_refl). assert (Hmem : List.In (fresh_var x t p) (x :: fvs_trm t ++ fvs_frm p)) by
  (apply List.in_cons; apply in_or_app; right; exact Hin). assert (Hmaxs_spec : forall (l : list ivar) (n : ivar), List.In n l -> n <= maxs l) by
  (induction l as [|a l IH]; simpl; intros n H;
   [contradiction | destruct H as [H|H]; [subst; apply Nat.le_max_l | apply le_trans with (maxs l); [apply IH, H | apply Nat.le_max_r]]]). assert (Hle : fresh_var x t p <= maxs (x :: fvs_trm t ++ fvs_frm p)) by apply (Hmaxs_spec _ _ Hmem). unfold fresh_var in Hle. exact (Nat.nle_succ_diag_l _ Hle).
